name: io.github.ndjordjevic/pinrag
title: PinRAG
description: MCP RAG server: index PDFs, GitHub Repos, YouTube, Discord, Plain Text; query with citations.

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key — required for the default LLM (Claude). Set PINRAG_LLM_PROVIDER=openai to use OpenAI instead.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key — required for default embeddings. Also used when PINRAG_LLM_PROVIDER=openai.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Chroma vector store directory (recommended so indexes are not tied to the server process cwd).
environmentVariables.name: PINRAG_PERSIST_DIR
